case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSHUA JERMAINE PAYTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYTON, JOSHUA JERMAINE $525.32 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.32 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
